/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_sftp_target.dir/test_sftp_target_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_sftp_target.dir/tests/test_sftp_target.cpp.o -o test_sftp_target -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib lib/libgtest_main.a libSftpTarget_lib.a lib/libgtest.a libbacky_x_core.a libCredentialManager_lib.a -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers /opt/homebrew/Cellar/curl/8.14.0/lib/libcurl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/curl/8.14.0/lib/libcurl.dylib
